CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2014 Off Calendar

Application For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Robert Cohen, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, PPH VEHICLE MANAGEMENT SERVICES, LLC, dba PHH ARVAL.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CLAUDIA MARIA LOPEZ.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $16,917.40
Pre-Judgment Interest: $4,714.20
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $435.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $22,066.60
Judgment signed in open court.
